2183440.name: OceanCraft Demo
2183440.description:
This is the demo version of OceanCraft!

Survive alone - or with your friends - on a self build vehicle in the middle of the ocean.

The demo version of OceanCrafts already contains the core gameplay features of the full game: survivial, crafting and mulitplayer.
- Craft floors to expand your base
- Collect crafting ressources and food out of the ocean
- Plant, grow and harvest vegetables
- Prepare and grill your vegetables
- Play alone or with your friends
- Private or public games
- Mulitple save games

This demo can be played cross platform mulitplayer with the quest demo version on sidequest, but is not compatible with the full game!

If you enjoy the demo consider buying the full game for hours of more gameplay and fun!
